title: Nyemo cold snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Nyemo, with a Z-Score of -3.14. This event is rated as CRITICAL with a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Nyemo are extremely cold, with a significant impact on the daily life of residents. 
 The Heating Degree Days (HDD) is at 12.0 GG, indicating a high energy demand for heating. 
 The humidity is at 83% and the wind speed is at 4.0 km/h, making the cold even more unbearable.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the effects of the cold snap.
